_comment: Spec 013 / T08 — Tesla per-job detail envelope for listing 200003. Exercises the SINGLE-field path: only jobCompensationAndBenefits populated; the other three fields are omitted. composeDescription() should emit a one-section string with the `Compensation & Benefits:` label.
jobCompensationAndBenefits: Hourly compensation range: $34 — $48 USD. Shift differential available for swing / graveyard slots. Health insurance, retirement benefits and on-site cafeteria included.
